html:
LETTER OF APPOINTMENT

Name : {{doc.applicant_name}}
Date : {{frappe.utils.format_date(doc.offer_date)}}

We have pleasure in offering you employment as {{doc.designation}} in {{doc.department1}}, Subject to your
acceptance of the following terms and conditions.

  1. That the terms of this contract shall be on an open terms basis.
  2. That your employment will be deemed to commence from the date of joining.
  3. That your monthly Gross salary shall be Qr {{ doc.basic_salary_qar + doc.allowance }}) (ie. Basic Salary Qar {{doc.basic_salary_qar}}/-, + Allowance {{doc.allowance}})
  4. Shared Bachelor accommodation will be provided by the company
  5. You will be on probation for 3 months; on satisfactory completion of the probationary period your appointment will be confirmed.
  6. That you will be entitled to get leave of 30 days for each completed 1 year of employment
  7. That you will be eligible for no other leave than on medical grounds.
  8. That you will be provided with Company Transportation.
  9. That the Company will provide you return air ticket with leave salary (as per Qatar Labor Law) for
    every completed One year of service for yourself.
  10. That the company will provide the Medical card issued by Hamad Medical Corporation
  11. In case of extra leaves more than your allowed annual leaves the extra leave days allowances will deduct from
    your salary
  12. The Company will provide Insurance for injuries, disability or death during work or arising there from
    according to Qatar Labor Law
  13. That you will be available for employment anywhere in Qatar as the Company’s requirement dictate.
  14. That you should not undertake any other employment either paid or unpaid, either full time or part time while
    in this Company’s service.
  15. That this contract may be terminated with one month’s notice by either party. The Company also reserves the
    right to terminate your service without notice in the event of any breach of any conditions of this contract or on
    grounds of gross misconduct, breaking the laws of the Country or insubordination, in this event you will be
    immediately repatriated by the earliest possible means without prejudice to any claim for debt or damages that
    the Company may have against you
  16. Upon termination of your employment for any cause, or any reason whatsoever, you shall not for a period of next one year thereafter reside in Qatar undertake or carry on either alone or in partnership or be employed or interested directly in any capacity whatsoever the business carried on by this Company in Qatar.
  17. This contract shall be governed by the laws of Qatar.

In case the above terms and conditions are agreeable to you, kindly sign this contract in acceptance as indicated below and return signed copy for our records.

For And On Behalf of

{{doc.company}}


Manager-Finance & Accounts

I, hereby accept this contract with Al Shaghairi Trading & Contracting Co. W.L.L(Electra) under the terms and conditions mentioned above.

TARDY: If the employee reports to duty after 8.30 AM and before 9.00 AM shall be considered as TARDY and marked as PERMISSION and later on, it will be marked as Half Day Leave, same will be deducted from Casual leave (if available) or from the Annual Leave (if Leave balance is available).
PERMISSION: If the employee informs his/ her immediate supervisor & HR, with 1 day prior notice that, the employee is going to attend the duty late or leaving the work place early (before the office closing time). Your offer is subject to the following conditions:

HR Manager Signature              


 

Service Agreement



This agreement is made between Al Shaghairi Trad & Cont Co (Electra), P.O. Box _____, Doha, Qatar (hereinafter called “The Employer”) of the one part and:
Name :{{doc.applicant_name}}
Contact No /E-Mail : {{doc.applicant_email}}
Passport No : {{doc.passport_number or ""}}

(Hereinafter called “The Employee”) of the other part do hereby agree as follows:

1.Agreement
The employer engages the Employee, and the Employee undertakes to serve the Employer anywhere within the Qatar or abroad, as the case may be required from time to time in connection with the business of the Employer.

2.Position / Designation
At present you are being appointed as {{doc.designation}} (Designation). However, we may utilise your ability in any field/function in the best interests of the Group or any of its constituent companies.

3.Effective Date of Agreement & Joining
This agreement and your appointment shall be effective from your date of joining the company.

Date of Joining :{{doc.joining_date}}

4.Service
The service contract is for the period of 2 years (24 months). The employment shall continue on a renewable basis till either party intends to terminate as per clause 10 below. Finalization of your employment status with us is subject to the approval of your residency permit and/or labour card by the Qatar Labour and Immigration Department.

5.Remuneration, Benefits & Perks
Your pay and allowances is appended as Annexure.
You will be entitled for:
5.1 Accommodation: You will be provided with a bachelor shared staff accommodation.

You will be provided with a monthly HRA as mentioned in annexure. Initially, you can be provided with bachelor shared staff accommodation in lieu of HRA for a maximum period of 1 month. (Mention if required).

5.2 Transport: You will be provided free pick and drop facility from the company staff accommodation to your place of work if staying in staff accommodation. Transport facility may be extended if you are staying on your own but only if your accommodation is on the standard route covered by company vehicles. Else you will be provided with a transportation allowance unless otherwise specified.In case you fulfil the driving license requirements as per the regulations of the country, a separate company-maintained vehicle may be provided, if your profile warrants and on management discretion or a vehicle allowance in lieu of the vehicle as per company policy.



5.3 Paid Leave: You will be provided with a paid leave on completion of every 11 months of active service. The leave is accumulated at the rate of 21 days for every 1 year of active service.

5.4 Airfare: You will be provided with a fixed round trip airfare for self and family (if eligible as per company policy) after every 11 months of active service to your home country as per company policy.

5.4 Airfare: You will be provided with a fixed round trip airfare for self and family (if eligible as per company policy) after every 11 months of active service to your home country as per company policy.

5.5 Medical: Employees are either provided with medical card (Hamad Medical Card) or medical expenses are directly reimbursed by company, including family (spouse and up to 2 children, if eligible as per company policy).

5.6Gratuity: Gratuity is paid as per Qatar labour laws.

5.7 Mobile Reimbursement: You may be provided with a mobile instrument allowance and /or mobile reimbursement depending upon your grade and job requirement.

5.8 Family Status: If your position is eligible for family status, you will be entitled for a round trip airfare for spouse & up to 2 unemployed and/or unmarried children living with you in Qatar on residence visa under your sponsorship.
Further, if at a future date, the company introduces any new remuneration or benefit policies, makes modifications to the salary / remuneration structure, your present remuneration will be suitably modified / amended through separate written order.

6.Immediate Postings & Transfers
It is understood and agreed upon that your services are based on job / business requirements and are liable to be transferred to any of our other offices / companies, whether in existence or planned in future, in Qatar and abroad at our sole discretion.

7.Probation
You will be on probation, initially for a period of 6 months from the date of joining. Your case may be considered for confirmation as a regular employee after satisfactory completion of your probationary period. If due to performance he/she gets terminated / Resigned all the expenses related to Sponsor change will be deducted from the salary.

8.General Rules & Regulations
You will be governed by the various rules and regulations / service conditions framed by the company from time to time. Existing general rules and regulations forming an integral part of this offer and indicative in nature are listed below:

8.1 You shall not, during the continuance of your employment with us, be engaged, concerned or interested directly or indirectly, in any other occupation, business or employment whatever, whether honorary or remuneratory without the previous consent in writing of the company. You shall devote the whole of your time, attention and abilities exclusively to the performance of your duties hereunder and shall in all respects obey and confirm to the company’s orders and regulations, as well as faithfully serve the company and use your best endeavour to promote the interest thereof, and of the business in which you shall for the time being be engaged in connection with the business of any of the Group companies. You shall at all times readily conform to obey and execute all lawful orders which may be issued to you by such Group companies.

8.2You shall not, either during the continuance of your employment or at any point of time thereafter discuss, divulge or communicate by word of mouth or otherwise to any person or persons, whatsoever, any information of a secret or confidential nature entrusted to you or coming to your knowledge, relating to the trade or business of the company or of its customer, or administrative / organisational matter pertaining to the company or any of which may be your personal privilege to know by virtue of being in employment with the company or any such other information the disclosure of which in the opinion of the company, is likely to be prejudicial to the interest of the company. Said trade secrets consisting but not necessarily limited to:
8.2.1 information concerning Company's business, including cost information, profits, sales information, accounting and unpublished financial information, business plans, markets and marketing methods, customer lists and customer information, purchasing techniques, supplier lists and supplier information and advertising strategies;
8.2.2 technical information concerning Company's products and services, including product know-how, formulas, designs, devices, diagrams, software code, test results, processes, inventions, research projects and product development, technical memoranda and correspondence;
8.2.3 information concerning Company's employees, including salaries, strengths, weaknesses and skills;
8.2.4 information submitted by Company's customers, suppliers, employees, consultants or co-venture partner with Company for study, evaluation or use; and
8.2.5 any other information not generally known to the public which, if misused or disclosed, could reasonably be expected to adversely affect Company's business.


8.3. You, during the continuance of your employment with the company are precluded from entering / indulging into activities, which in the opinion of the company either constitute or could result in an actual or potential conflict of interest with your employment with the company, until and unless prior permission in writing to engage in such activities has been granted to you by the company.


8.4 If, you shall be guilty of misconduct, commit any breach of this contract of employment or refuse or wilfully neglect to perform to the satisfaction of the company or any of the group companies in connection with whose business you may be engaged, all or any of the duties devolving upon you under this contract of employment, the company may at once, without any previous notice, terminate the contract of your employment, solely at your cost, risk and responsibility.


8.5 Your probationary appointment, confirmation as well as continued employment in the services of the company is subject to you being found and remaining in sound physical and mental health.


8.6 As and when required you shall report for any medical examination to a qualified medical consultant(s) as recommended / appointed by the company.


8.7 The age of superannuating will be 65 (Sixty-Five) years, the actual date of retirement shall be the last working day of the calendar month in which your 65th birthday falls or till the validity of your last renewed visa as approved by the Labour department.


8.9 In case you remain absent from your duty without prior express permission in writing of the management or if you proceed on leave without first getting it sanctioned for a continuous period of 7 days, your services would be liable to terminate purely at the discretion of the management without any further reference to you and without any terminal benefits.


8.10 The appointment and its continuity will be subject to the receipt of a satisfactory verification report from your previous employer reference.

8.11 During your employment with the company you will be governed by such Rules, Regulations, Instructions and Policies as are now in force, which may be amended, altered or extended from time to time and your acceptance of this offer carries with it your acceptance to obey all such Rules, Regulations, Instructions and Policies applicable to the employees of your grade / category from time to time.

8.12 You are required to deal with the company’s money, materials and documents with utmost honesty and professional ethics. If you are found guilty, at any point of time of moral corruption or of dishonesty in dealing with the company’s money or material or documents or theft of any information or misappropriation regardless of the value involved, your services would be terminated with immediate effect notwithstanding other terms and conditions mentioned in the appointment letter.

9.Employee Obligations
9.1 It is an inherent condition of the employment that the information furnished by the Employee to the Employer as to his record, abilities and other matters, both professional as well as personal are true and correct in every particular and that the Employee has not concealed or withheld any material information relating thereto and accordingly. If any such particular shall be found to be incorrect or if is discovered that the Employee has failed to disclose any such material information, the employer can terminate the Employment.

9.2 If the Employee is absent from work due to illness or injuries he shall report the same as soon as possible to an authorised person and submit a medical examination report and medical certificate duly attested by Qatar Government Hospital.

9.3 If on termination / resignation from employment, the Employee should surrender all company equipment / property in his/her possession.

9.4 Any invention, procedure or system (including software code and systems) which the Employee may make or discover during the course or by reason of his employment, and any improvement in software and any other process or procedure used or useful for the Employer’s business, shall belong exclusively to the Employer to whom the Employee shall give full details, descriptions and workings in writing.

10.Termination of the Agreement

This agreement may be terminated under the following circumstances and conditions:

10.1 By mutual agreement, between the Employer and the Employee.

10.2 By Employer without allowing any period of notice or making any payment in lieu of notice during the initial probation period or as per the laws of Qatar outside the probation period.

10.3 By Employee giving three months notice to the Employer in writing outside the probation period or basic salary in lieu thereof. Such notice salary where due, may be deducted from the dues to which the employee would be eligible on such termination. Further if such termination of the contract is initiated by Employee, then the company may, at it’s sole discretion either accept the resignation of the Employee immediately, or at any point during the notice period of three month(s), provided, that the company may, if it shall so choose, deduct from the Employee salary in lieu of balance period of his/her notice. In addition, when the employee leaves within 1 year of joining, then 100% of recruitment charges, training charges etc. are payable by the Employee and the Employer may deduct such charges from the Employees dues, if any. If the Employee leaves the company within 1 to 3 years of joining then 50 % of the above mentioned charges are to be paid by the Employee to the Employer.

10.4 By the Employer without allowing any period of notice or making any payment in lieu of notice if the Employee shall commit any serious offence that would justify his dismissal under the laws of Qatar. This includes the terms as described under clause 8 above.

11. Discipline, Safety Code and Security Procedures
The Employee will abide by the Employer’s safety & security policies and disciplinary code which are in force from time to time. This includes understanding and abiding by these codes in the spirit and letter laid down for the same. This is in the own interest of the Employee's safety as well as to protect the company’s interest.

Personal gadgets are not allowed to be used inside the company premises. This is to prevent misuse of company assets including confidential information.

You may keep a copy of this agreement for your records and return the original / copy service agreement duly signed and accepted, to:

HR & Administration Department
Company Name :{{doc.applicant_name}}
PO Box

We take pleasure in welcoming you to our organization and wish you a successful career with us.


Signature


For {{doc.designation}}                       {{doc.applicant_name}}

LETTER OF APPOINTMENT

{{doc.salutation}} {{ doc.applicant_name }}                              Date: {{frappe.utils.format_date (doc.offer_date or '')}}


We have pleasure in offering you employment as {{doc.designation}} in {{doc.company}}., Subject to your acceptance of the following terms and conditions.

1.That the terms of this contract shall be on an open terms basis.
2.That your employment will be deemed to commence from the date of joining.
3.That your monthly Gross salary shall be Qrs. {{doc.gross_salary_}} {{frappe.utils.money_in_words(doc.gross_salary)}} (ie. Basic Salary: Qrs. {{doc.basic}} , Allowance: Qrs.{{doc.allowance}} and Transportation: Qrs.{{doc.transportation_}})
4.Shared Bachelor accommodation will be provided by the company
5.You will be on probation for 3 months; on satisfactory completion of the probationary period your appointment will be confirmed.
6.That you will be entitled to get leave of 30 days for each completed 1 year of employment.
7.That you will be eligible for no other leave than on medical grounds.
8.That you will be provided with Company Transportation.
9.That the Company will provide you return air ticket with leave salary (as per Qatar Labor Law) for every completed One year of service for yourself. 10.That the company will provide the Medical card issued by Hamad Medical Corporation.
11. In case of extra leaves more than your allowed annual leaves the extra leave days allowances will deduct from your salary
12.The Company will provide Insurance for injuries, disability or death during work or arising there from according to Qatar Labor Law.
13.That you will be available for employment anywhere in Qatar as the Company's requirement dictate.
14.That you should not undertake any other employment either paid or unpaid, either full time or part time while in this Company's service.
15. That this contract may be terminated with one month's notice by either party. The Company also reserves the right to terminate your service without notice in the event of any breach of any conditions of this contract or on grounds of gross misconduct, breaking the laws of the Country or insubordination, in this event you will be immediately repatriated by the earliest possible means without prejudice to any claim for debt or damages that the Company may have against you.
16.Upon termination of your employment for any cause, or any reason whatsoever, you shall not for a period of next one year thereafter reside in Qatar undertake or carry on either alone or in partnership or be employed or interested directly in any capacity whatsoever the business carried on by this Company in Qatar.
17.This contract shall be governed by the laws of Qatar.
In case the above terms and con eable toyou, kindly sign this contract in acceptance as indicated below and return signed copy for our records.
For And On Behalf of
